design: 2 subjects × 2 opposing stances × 5 paraphrases = 20 (archetype E). Each stance-pair is semantically near (same subject) but OPPOSITE via negation; they must NOT be merged. Requires the LLM verifier (--two-tier); pure cosine merges them.

synths.name: make-peace
paraphrases: We want to make peace with our neighbors.
We want to make peace with neighboring countries.
We want to establish peace with our neighbors.
We want to make peace with the neighboring nations.
We hope to make peace with our neighbors.

synths.name: no-peace
paraphrases: We do not want to make peace with our neighbors.
We do not want to make peace with neighboring countries.
We refuse to make peace with our neighbors.
We do not want to establish peace with our neighbors.
We are against making peace with our neighbors.

synths.name: raise-taxes
paraphrases: We should raise taxes to fund public services.
We should increase taxes to fund public services.
We should raise taxes to pay for public services.
We should raise taxes to support public services.
We ought to raise taxes to fund public services.

synths.name: no-raise-taxes
paraphrases: We should not raise taxes to fund public services.
We should not increase taxes to fund public services.
We should avoid raising taxes to fund public services.
We oppose raising taxes to fund public services.
We should not raise taxes for public services.
